svg.text: Entropy shapes the intervention window, but it is not the movement variable
Across saved self-training runs, data source and optimizer-update count control token entropy; selection still needs variation on the chosen value axis.
Five training rounds; dots are individual runs, lines are cell means (n=2).
share of training data generated by the model
More optimizer updates accelerate entropy loss
Per round: 5, 10, or 20 AdamW updates; effective batch 16. Mean ± SE across 12 runs.
Token entropy does not tell us whether selection can move the value
OLMo risk model and Qwen insecure-code model: the judge needs value-axis variation and a nonzero kept-minus-pool gap.
Bars have separate scales; they are not pooled into one metric.
Entropy is upstream context; it is neither sufficient nor interchangeable with value-axis variation.
